---
title: "Instructors"
date: "2025-05-14"
---


#### Open Science Team

##### SciLifeLab Training Hub

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-2}
![](img/john-doe.png){width=80}
:::
::: {.g-col-10}
This demo course instance uses a simple team-level instructor entry to illustrate how a published
previous course run can look in the template.
:::
:::
